news.t: Janus Henderson Launches US Equity Enhanced Income ETF (JUDO)

holdings.infoBox: JUDO is an equity ETF with a total of 193 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.08%, Alphabet at 7.05%, Microsoft at 5.61%, Amazon.com at 4.67%, and Apple at 4.44%.

overview.description: The Janus Henderson U.S. Equity Enhanced Income ETF (JUDO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in dividend-paying US companies. It also employs an option strategy to enhance income. JUDO was launched on Mar 24, 2026 and is issued by Janus Henderson.

data.title: Janus Henderson Launches US Equity Enhanced Income ETF (JUDO)
data.text: DENVER--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Janus Henderson (NYSE: JHG), today announced it has launched the Janus Henderson US Equity Enhanced Income ETF (JUDO). This ETF aims to generate current income by actively inv...
